skos:Concept.skos:scopeNote: Use for vessels believed to come from Australasia but where the precise nationality is not known.
Use for vessels registered in New Zealand.
Use for vessels registered in the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
Use for vessels registered in the Faroe (also spelt Faeroe) Islands, e.g. at Torshavn
Use for vessels registered in Norway.
Use for vessels registered in the Republic of Ireland (Eire).
Use for vessels registered in Romania.
Use for vessels registered in Latvia.
Use for vessels registered in France.
Use for vessels registered in Turkey or the Ottoman Empire.
Use for vessels registered in Iceland.
Use for vessels registered in Greece.
Use for vessels registered in Slovakia. See also Czechoslovakian (for vessels registered between 1918-1992)
Use for vessels registered in Poland.
Use for vessels registered in Portugal.
Use for vessels registered in Slovenia.
Use for vessels believed to come from Europe but where the precise nationality is not known.
Use for vessels registered in the Netherlands.
Use for vessels registered in Switzerland.
Use for vessels registered in Yugoslavia between 1918 and 1992.
Use for vessels registered in Croatia.
Use for vessel registered in Cyprus whether Greek or Turkish.
Use for vessels registered in Germany or any of the states prior to unification.
Use for vessels registered in Estonia.
Use for vessels registered in Russia.
Use for vessels registered in Italy.
Use for vessels registered in Spain.
Use for vessels registered in Jersey, Guernsey or another of the other Channel Islands.
Use for vessels registered in the Czech Republic. See also Czechoslovakian (for vessels registered between 1918-1992)
Use for vessels registered in the Isle of Man.
Use for vessels registered in Sweden.
The nationality of a vessel according to its registration.
Use for vessels registered in Denmark
Use for vessels registered in Lithuania.
Use for vessels registered in Ukraine
Use for vessels registered in the former Czechoslovakia between 1918 and 1992. See also CZECH and SLOVAK.
Use for vessels registered in Hungary.
Use for vessels registered in Finland.
Use for vessels registered in Belgium.
Use for vessels registered in Malta.
Use for vessels registered in Austria.
Use for vessels registered in Northern Ireland.
Use for vessels registered in Liberia. Often used as a flag of convenience.
Use for vessels believed to come from Africa but where the precise nationality is not known.
Use for vessels believed to come from Asia but where the precise nationality is not known.
Use for vessels registered in Turkey or the Ottoman Empire.
Use for vessels registered in Algeria.
Use for vessels registered in Peru.
Use for vessels believed to come from South America but where the precise nationality is not known.
Use for vessels registered in Wales.
Of Somalia
Use for vessels registered in South Africa.
Use for vessels registered in India.
Use for vessels registered in Japan.
Use for vessels registered in Antigua.
Use for vessels believed to come from North America but where the precise nationality is not known.
Use for vessels registered in Venezuela.
Use for vessels registered in Scotland.
Use for vessels registered in Argentina.
Use for vessels registered in Morocco.
Use for vessels registered in Canada.
Used for vessels registered in Malaysia.
Use for vessels registered in Georgia.
Use for vessels registered in Cuba.
Use for vessels registered in Pakistan.
Use for vessels believed to come from Central America but where the precise nationality is not known.
Use for vessels registered in Panama. Often used as a flag of convenience.
Use for vessel registered in Cyprus whether Greek or Turkish.
Descriptive of inhabitants of, and cultural artefacts belonging to, Vietnam.
Use for vessels registered in Uruguay.
Use for vessels registered in Australia.
Use for vessels registered in England
Use for vessels registered in the United States of America.
Use for vessels registered in Brazil.
Use for vessels registered in Egypt.
Use for vessels registered in Russia.
Use for vessels registered in the Philippines.
Use for vessels registered in China.
Used for the island of Jamaica which gained independence from Britain in 1958.
